Home / Services / Concrete Slabs

Concrete Slabs

Durable and level concrete slabs for sheds, garages, and more.

Need a solid foundation for your shed, garage, or workshop? Total Concrete Services, INC specializes in pouring level and durable concrete slabs throughout Bakersfield. We understand the importance of a properly prepared base to prevent cracking and settling. Our team meticulously grades the site, compacts the soil, and installs a reinforced concrete slab that will withstand heavy loads and extreme temperatures. Whether you're building a new storage shed in Oleander-Sunset or adding a garage to your Seven Oaks home, we can provide a concrete slab that meets your specific needs. We use high-quality concrete mixes and precise finishing techniques to ensure a smooth, level surface. Our experienced team is committed to providing exceptional craftsmanship and outstanding customer service. Let us provide the solid foundation you need for your next project.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Site Preparation & Grading
  2. 02 Step 2: Soil Compaction
  3. 03 Step 3: Formwork & Rebar Installation
  4. 04 Step 4: Concrete Pour & Finishing

Benefits

  • Level and stable foundation
  • Protection against soil movement and settling
  • Increased property value
  • Durable and long-lasting surface

Frequently Asked Questions

How thick should a concrete slab be?

The required thickness depends on the intended use of the slab. For sheds and light-duty applications, a 4-inch slab is typically sufficient. For garages and heavier loads, a 6-inch or thicker slab may be required.

Do you offer concrete slab repair services?

Yes, we offer concrete slab repair services, including crack repair, leveling, and patching. We'll assess the damage and recommend the most effective solution to restore the slab's integrity.

How long does it take to pour a concrete slab?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project. Generally, it takes 1-2 days for smaller slabs and longer for larger projects. We'll provide a detailed schedule during the initial consultation.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with concrete slabs? Contact us today.
